LanguageData.DevDesigner_Blood_Apparel_KiteShield.des: An elongated shield that offers a wide area of protection. Somewhat bulky for close combat. \n\nThis kite shield carries the colors of house Sanguin.
LanguageData.DevDesigner_Blood_Apparel_Kite2Shield.de: An elongated shield that offers a wide area of protection. Somewhat bulky for close combat. \n\nThis kite shield carries the colors of house Sanguin.
